evals.name: ranked-findings
evals.prompt: What observability gaps do we have, most important first?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-observability preflight` then `cub-observability findings` (JSON or -o table), most-severe first. Read-only.

evals.name: uncovered
evals.prompt: Which metrics Services aren't being scraped?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-observability findings --analyzer coverage` and reports uncovered metrics Services.

evals.name: dangling
evals.prompt: Do we have any ServiceMonitors that select nothing?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-observability findings --analyzer dangling` and reports dangling ServiceMonitors.

evals.name: routes-fix-elsewhere
evals.expected_output: Routes to observability-instrument (`cub-observability ensure-servicemonitor`) rather than mutating from this read-only skill.
